business.name: Finish Carpentry LLC
business.tagline: Expert Custom Carpentry in Dallas, TX

seo.title: Finish Carpentry LLC | Expert Custom Carpentry in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Trusted carpenter in Dallas, TX. Custom trim, built-ins, cabinetry, and finish work. Premium craftsmanship for your home. Call (214) 437-5788.

hero.headline: Transform Your Home with Expert Craftsmanship
hero.subheadline: From custom built-ins to intricate crown molding, we bring precision and artistry to every project.

featureSections.title: Tailored Storage Solutions
featureSections.body: Maximize your space with custom built-in shelving, entertainment centers, and window seats. Each piece is designed to fit your home perfectly and reflect your style.
featureSections.cardBody: We handle every step from initial design to final installation, ensuring a flawless result.

featureSections.title: Elegant Finishing Touches
featureSections.body: Crown molding, baseboards, wainscoting, and more. Our precise installation adds character and value to any room.
featureSections.cardBody: Our attention to detail ensures clean lines and lasting durability.

whyChooseUs.title: Master Craftsmanship
whyChooseUs.description: Years of experience honing the art of fine carpentry. Every cut, joint, and finish meets our exacting standards.

whyChooseUs.title: Personalized Service
whyChooseUs.description: We listen to your vision and work closely with you to bring it to life. Your project is unique, and we treat it that way.

whyChooseUs.title: Reliable & Punctual
whyChooseUs.description: We show up on time, communicate clearly, and complete projects within the agreed timeline. No surprises.

whyChooseUs.title: Quality Materials
whyChooseUs.description: We source premium lumber, veneers, and finishes to ensure your investment lasts for years to come.

testimonials.quote: The custom built-ins transformed our living room. The craftsmanship is outstanding—every detail perfect. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: Professional from start to finish. The crown molding installation was seamless. Will definitely use again.
testimonials.author: James T.

testimonials.quote: We hired them for a complete trim package. The team was courteous, clean, and the work is beautiful. Worth every penny.
testimonials.author: Linda R.

cta.headline: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.subheadline: Contact us today for a free consultation and estimate.

servicesPage.intro: We offer a full range of custom carpentry services for homeowners in Dallas. From concept to completion, our team delivers exceptional quality and attention to detail.

services.title: Custom Built-Ins
services.shortDescription: Designed and built to fit your space perfectly.
services.longDescription: Our custom built-ins include bookcases, entertainment centers, window seats, and home office solutions. We use premium materials and expert joinery to create pieces that are both functional and beautiful.

process.title: Consultation & Design
process.description: We meet on-site to discuss your needs, take measurements, and create a custom design.

process.title: Material Selection
process.description: We help you choose the perfect wood, finish, and hardware to match your decor.

process.title: Installation & Finish
process.description: Our craftsmen build and install your built-ins with precision, leaving a flawless finish.

faqs.question: How long does a custom built-in project take?
faqs.answer: Timeline varies based on complexity, but most projects are completed within 1-3 weeks.

faqs.question: Can you match existing trim and style?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We take great care to match profiles, stains, and paints for a seamless look.

services.title: Crown Molding & Trim
services.shortDescription: Add elegance and character to any room.
services.longDescription: Expert installation of crown molding, baseboards, chair rails, wainscoting, and door/window casings. Our precise miter cuts and seamless joints elevate the look of your home.

process.title: Measure & Plan
process.description: We assess your rooms and recommend molding profiles that complement your space.

process.title: Precision Cutting
process.description: Using professional tools, we cut each piece with exact angles for tight joints.

process.title: Install & Caulk
process.description: We install securely, fill gaps, and finish with caulk for a polished appearance.

faqs.question: Can you install crown molding on textured ceilings?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have techniques to ensure a clean fit even with popcorn or textured ceilings.

faqs.question: Do you paint the trim as well?
faqs.answer: We can install primed or pre-finished trim, or coordinate with your painter for final coats.

services.title: Custom Cabinetry
services.shortDescription: Beautiful, functional cabinets for any room.
services.longDescription: We design and build custom cabinets for kitchens, bathrooms, laundry rooms, and more. Our cabinets feature dovetail drawers, soft-close hinges, and premium finishes.
benefits: Wide range of styles and finishes

process.title: Design Consultation
process.description: We discuss your storage needs, style preferences, and budget to create a cabinet plan.

process.title: Build & Finish
process.description: Our shop crafts your cabinets with precision joinery and high-quality finishes.

process.title: Professional Installation
process.description: We install your cabinets level and square, ensuring perfect alignment and operation.

faqs.question: Do you offer refacing or only new cabinets?
faqs.answer: We specialize in new custom cabinets, but can also reface existing boxes for a fresh look.

faqs.question: What materials do you use?
faqs.answer: We use plywood boxes, solid wood doors, and premium hardware for lasting quality.

services.title: Custom Doors & Windows
services.shortDescription: Unique doors and window casings that make a statement.
services.longDescription: From interior French doors to custom window casings and shutters, we create openings that stand out. Our work includes barn doors, pocket doors, and arched windows.

process.title: Design & Measure
process.description: We take precise measurements and help you select door styles and materials.

process.title: Custom Fabrication
process.description: We build doors and casings in our shop to your exact specifications.

process.title: Install & Finish
process.description: Our team installs with care, ensuring proper operation and a beautiful finish.

faqs.question: Can you create a custom-sized door?
faqs.answer: Yes, we build doors to any size, including non-standard openings.

faqs.question: Do you install pre-hung doors?
faqs.answer: Yes, we install pre-hung doors and can also build custom jambs for existing openings.

about.headline: Craftsmanship You Can Trust
about.mission: To provide Dallas homeowners with exceptional custom carpentry that enhances their living spaces and stands the test of time.
story: Finish Carpentry LLC was founded on a simple belief: quality workmanship never goes out of style. With over 15 years of experience in the Dallas area, our founder started the company to bring a higher standard of finish carpentry to local homeowners. We take pride in every project, no matter the size.

From our first custom built-in to our latest crown molding installation, we have built a reputation for reliability, precision, and beautiful results. Our team treats your home with the same care we would our own, and we are committed to exceeding expectations every time.

coreValues.title: Quality First
coreValues.description: We never cut corners. Every joint, finish, and detail meets our high standards.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: Honest pricing, clear communication, and respect for your home and time.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your vision drives our work. We listen, adapt, and deliver what you want.

coreValues.title: Continuous Improvement
coreValues.description: We stay updated on the latest techniques and materials to offer the best solutions.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to discuss your project? We'd love to hear from you.
